hero.title: Join the game
hero.message: Create your league or join your friends' to start predicting together.
hero.footnote: You can also predict without a league — your points still count overall.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: The leaderboard will appear after the first scored matches.
leaderboard.tieNote: Ties are broken by number of exact scores, then correct predictions.

create.nameHelper: Between 3 and 40 characters. Visible to your members.
create.privacyNote: Private league, accessible by invite code only. You share it yourself.
create.colorHint: The icon uses your league's initials. No upload needed.

success.title: League created!
success.message: {{name}} is ready. Invite your friends with this code before you go in.
success.reinvite: You can re-invite anytime from the settings.

join.intro: Enter the 8-character code from your friend — or paste the invite link directly.
join.pasteEmpty: No invite code in the clipboard.
join.linkDetected: Code detected from the pasted link
join.hint: We show you a preview of the league before you join — nothing is confirmed as you type.

preview.alreadyMember: You're already in this league. Open it directly to see the leaderboard.
preview.fullNote: This league is full ({{count}} members). Ask the admin to make room, then try again.

detail.shareMessage: Join my league "{{name}}" on TryCast with code {{code}}!

solo.title: You're on your own for now
solo.message: The leaderboard comes alive as soon as a friend joins. Share your invite code.

results.notPlayedMessage: Round {{round}} points will show here once the matches are done and predictions reconciled.
results.dayNote: Points for this round only — not the season total.
results.empty: Per-round results arrive after the first finished matches.

settings.codeHint: Share this code: your friends enter it to join the league.
settings.removeHint: Removing a member requires confirmation. They can rejoin with the code.
settings.leaveText: You'll lose access to this league's leaderboard and history.
settings.ownerWarning: You're the creator. Transfer ownership before leaving, or delete the league for everyone.
settings.transferSub: Make a member the new admin.

leave.title: Leave this league?
leave.message: You're leaving {{name}}. You'll lose access to its leaderboard and your history here. You can rejoin with the code.

delete.title: Delete {{name}}?
delete.intro: This action is irreversible. For all members:

losses.access: Access cut off for all members

delete.acknowledge: I understand the league and its leaderboard will be permanently deleted.

kick.title: Remove {{username}}?
kick.message: {{username}} will lose access to {{name}} and its leaderboard. You can re-invite them with the code.

transfer.title: Transfer ownership
transfer.subtitle: Make a member the new league admin.
transfer.note: You'll become a regular member — the new admin can remove you.

validation.nameLength: The name must be 3 to 40 characters.
validation.codeFormat: The code is 8 characters (letters and numbers).

errors.server: Couldn't reach the server. Try again in a moment.
